name: Spider Venom
description:
This venom erodes its target's defenses, aiding the spider in securing prey.

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Saving Throw

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and Sickened 1 (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage, Clumsy 1, and Sickened 2 (1 round)

Stage 3 ] damage, Clumsy 2, and Sickened 3 (1 round)
